data.title: Nexxen releases Supplemental Proxy Statement for 2025 AGM on Dec 30. New updates for global advertising technology platform.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Nexxen International Ltd. (NASDAQ: NEXN) disclosed that it has released a Supplemental Proxy Statement for its upcoming 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders set for December 30, 2025. The company is recognized as a worldwide advertising technology platform proficient in data and advanced TV services. The AGM is a crucial event for shareholders to partake in important decisions regarding the company's operations.
ISRAEL, SOMALILAND TO RECOGNIZE EACH OTHER - NETANYAHU OFFICE

data.title: North Star Capital Fund LLC now open for investment, focuses on real estate loans, emphasizes common sense underwriting, and conservative loan-to-value ratios.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, in Concord, California, the North Star Capital Fund LLC, known as the "Fund," reaffirmed its dedication to real estate-backed loans secured by Deeds of Trust. Emphasizing rational underwriting practices, the Fund maintains conservative loan-to-value ratios in its operations. Specializing in this area, the Fund remains committed to its investment strategy.

data.title: Bluebird CFW Foundation Repair & Waterproofing in Michigan offers free foundation inspections for homeowners.
data.description: In Charlotte, Michigan, on December 26, 2025, Bluebird CFW Foundation Repair & Waterproofing, a reputable company specializing in foundation repair and waterproofing services in Michigan, has introduced a new program offering free foundation inspections to homeowners in the area. This program aims to assist homeowners in maintaining the integrity and safety of their homes by providing thorough inspections at no cost. This initiative from Bluebird CFW Foundation Repair & Waterproofing demonstrates their commitment to serving the community and ensuring that homes remain structurally sound.

data.title: Micron stock hits all-time high, up 220% YTD. Reports $13.64B revenue and $4.78 EPS. Offers 0.16% annual dividend yield.
data.description: Shares of Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MU) reached a new all-time high before slightly retracting, showing a spike of over 220% year-to-date by Christmas Eve. Micron impressed investors with its first-quarter revenue hitting $13.64 billion and adjusted earnings of $4.78 per share on Dec. 17, exceeding analyst predictions. The main driver of this surge is Micron's involvement in AI infrastructure. The company's recent success has attracted attention from investors eyeing potential dividends, with Micron currently offering an annual dividend yield of 0.16%, equating to a quarterly dividend of 11.5 cents per share (46 cents annually). This growth trend is likely to continue given Micron's promising position in the artificial intelligence sector.

data.title: Report on South African International Trade Trends 2025 covers 20+ key players in flour and grain mill products industry.
data.description: A recent report titled "South African International Trade Trends 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the manufacturing sector of flour and grain mill products, particularly focusing on maize and wheat milling. It covers crucial aspects such as production and consumption figures, pricing dynamics, consumption trends, food security concerns, input expenses, competitive landscape, and regulatory frameworks. Additionally, the report highlights insights on new investments, prominent industry players, and corporate activities.

data.title: Floor & Decor opens new store in Dearborn, Michigan, with 35 full-time and 15 part-time associates. NYSE: FND.
data.description: In Atlanta, the prominent retailer Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND) revealed the launch of its latest warehouse store and design hub in Dearborn, Michigan, at 1300 Shehadi Court. The Dearborn location boasts a staff of about 35 full-time and 15 part-time employees, under the leadership of Wesley Walker, the store’s Chief Executive Merchant. Floor & Decor's expansive reach extends to over 260 warehouse stores across the country.

data.title: Kickstarter campaign introduces PlayStix, a 5-in-1 titanium EDC tool resembling chopsticks.
data.description: In London on December 26, 2025, an innovative campaign was launched on Kickstarter unveiling PlayStix, a versatile 5-in-1 everyday-carry (EDC) tool made entirely of titanium. Despite its initial appearance resembling a simple pair of chopsticks, this compact tool packs multiple functions within its lightweight design.

data.title: Marietta, Ohio's West Side Safe and Gun, honored by Champion Safe Company for remarkable growth and community contributions.
data.description: A significant increase in COVID-19 cases has been reported in a certain region, with over 500 new cases confirmed in the past week alone. This surge has put immense pressure on local hospitals, where the number of COVID-19 patients has surpassed 200, leading to a shortage of beds and medical staff. The region's vaccination rate stands at 40%, with authorities urging residents to get vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, mask mandates have been reinforced, and large gatherings have been restricted to prevent further transmission. The situation remains critical as health officials predict a further rise in cases if preventive measures are not strictly followed.

data.title: TechForce Robotics to exhibit at CES 2026 in Las Vegas, showcasing proprietary robotics technologies and accepting customer orders. Visit Booth 6911 for live demonstrations and ordering info.
data.description: TechForce Robotics, operating as Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: NGTF), a leading AI-based service-robotics platform catering to the hospitality, foodservice, and commercial automation sectors, is set to showcase its innovations at CES® 2026 in Las Vegas from January 6 to 9. Interested individuals can explore live demos and engage with the TechForce Robotics team regarding product features, deployment strategies, and procurement possibilities at Booth 6911 during the event.

data.title: Celularity CEO supports CMS withdrawal of skin substitute LCDs impacting Biovance® products for Medicare coverage.
data.description: Celularity's Biovance® and Biovance 3L products were approved for Medicare coverage before the LCDs were removed. The CEO, Dr. Robert J. Hariri, expressed approval of the recent actions led by CMS Administrator Dr. Mehmet Oz.

data.title: YY Group's unaudited 1H 2025 earnings show revenue rose by 33.7% to $25.8M, gross profit by 79.5% to $4.3M, and total assets nearly tripled. Entered 3 new markets and acquired 3 IFM businesses.
data.description: The company experienced significant growth in revenue, which increased by 33.7% year over year to reach US$25.8 million. Additionally, the gross profit saw a substantial increase of 79.5% year over year, totaling US$4.3 million, showcasing improved margins. Total assets almost tripled compared to the previous year, bolstering the company's financial flexibility. Expansion efforts included entering three new global markets and acquiring three IFM businesses.

data.title: Allspring Closed-End Funds (EAD, ERC, ERH) announced monthly distributions in Charlotte, N.C. on Dec 26, 2025.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - On December 26, 2025, The Allspring Income Opportunities Fund (NYSE American: EAD), the Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (NYSE American: ERC), and the Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (NYSE American: ERH) have disclosed upcoming distributions. The tickers are indicated as follows: EAD, ERC, and ERH respectively.

data.title: Cedar Rapids, IA picks 374Water for PFAS biosolids project.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. Additionally, the report stated that new job creations exceeded expectations, with over 250,000 new jobs added in various sectors. This positive trend in the labor market has been attributed to the ongoing economic recovery efforts and increased consumer confidence. Experts predict that if this momentum continues, the country's economy could see further growth in the coming months.

data.title: Dow falls with record high close; Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla in buy zones.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following a record high close on Wednesday. Tech giants Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla are currently in favorable buy zones. This recent market development is of significant interest to investors and traders, showcasing the dynamic nature of stock price movements. The fluctuations observed in the market indicate the ongoing volatility and opportunities present for strategic investments.

data.title: Dow Jones sets record close, S&P 500 hits intraday high, Nvidia announces big AI deal after Christmas.
data.description: The Dow Jones achieved a historic closing high while the S&P 500 reached a peak during trading before the Christmas holiday. Companies like Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia are currently in favorable buying positions. However, following Christmas, Dow Jones futures experienced a drop alongside news of a significant artificial intelligence deal involving Nvidia.

data.title: South Africa Flour and Grain Mill Product Manufacturing Report 2025 highlights key players like Premier, Tiger Brands, and Pride Milling - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: In Dublin, the "Manufacture of Flour and Grain Mill Products in South Africa 2025" report is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive report delves into the production of flour and grain mill products, specifically maize and wheat milling. It covers essential aspects such as production and consumption figures, pricing dynamics, consumption trends, food security, input costs, competitive landscape, and regulatory environment. Additionally, the report highlights details on new investments, key players, and upcoming developments in the industry. It offers valuable insights into the market scenario and future prospects for the sector.

data.title: Tokenized commodities approach $4B, with gold setting record highs and investor demand rising for onchain financial products.
data.description: The popularity of tokenized commodities is rising as investors seek more convenient onchain financial options. This trend comes as gold and silver reach new record highs.

data.title: Bybit enforces monitoring and restrictions on non-compliant affiliate marketing in Korea. 2nd biggest crypto exchange.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, in Dubai, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume globally, Bybit, announced its ongoing efforts to strengthen its global compliance framework to comply with local laws and regulations. As a part of this initiative, Bybit will be making significant enhancements to ensure adherence to applicable requirements.

data.title: ArtWorkout's holiday campaign offers iPads, art classes, and subscriptions to users sharing drawing stories. Dec 25, 2025 - Jan 8, 2026.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 26, 2025, ArtWorkout, the top learn-to-draw application for iPad, announced the launch of ArtWorkoutCrazyStories. The holiday campaign encourages users to share their drawing motivations. Running from December 25, 2025, to January 8, 2026, the initiative aims to celebrate users' artistic inspirations.
